message:
fix(runtime): use unreachable! instead of panic! in nversion oracle test assertion

The match arm in the RequiresReceipt test was using panic!("expected
RequiresReceipt") for the catch-all branch, but this arm is structurally
unreachable after the pattern match succeeds. Using unreachable!() is
more semantically precise and produces better diagnostics if the
impossible branch is ever reached due to a refactor.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
